summary: FR-PPL-07/FR-XREL-03 Person Thread Focus A: read-only person focus layer on the thread spine. Shared ThreadDetail gains a strict required personFocus.people[] ({person:{id,name,relation}, eventIds}); new read-only repo helper findThreadPersonFocus(db, eventIds) joins event_people+people for the thread's events, dedupes person→eventIds (eventIds asc), sorts people name asc/id asc; getThreadDetail composes it (eventIds scoped to threadEvents, so out-of-thread links excluded). Frontend /threads/:id renders 관련 사람 chips (44px, aria-pressed) only when non-empty; tapping highlights matching event nodes (person-highlight) and dims unrelated event/task nodes (person-dimmed) via a unified single-mode nodeClass(base, resourceHL, personHL); person and resource focus are mutually exclusive (selecting one clears the other). CSS uses grouped selectors reusing resource highlight/dim/chip values (no drift). Chip clicks only set local state — no fetch/mutation/navigation. No new route handler, migration, column, DB write, LLM, or external. Committed 86b9064.
